⚡ Full Stack Dev
// 01 About

Building things that work, and feel good to use.

I'm a developer who enjoys the full spectrum of building software — wiring up databases and APIs, then turning around and obsessing over a button's hover state. That range is what keeps the work interesting.

My projects live on GitHub, where I push code, experiment with ideas, and learn in public. I care about writing things that are simple to read, easy to extend, and reliable under pressure.

Outside of code, I'm constantly tinkering — new frameworks, new tools, new ways of solving the same old problems a little better than before.
